name: narrated-video-validate-fragment
description: Reusable fragment: validate a narrated video artifact — checks file presence, audio stream, black frames, key-frame extraction, and audio/video duration alignment. Required context vars: narration_path, video_output_path, video_bundle_dir, mission_evidence_dir, video_slug (used for frame output dir and ffmpeg intermediate filenames).

params.cmd: test -f {{narration_path}} || { echo 'missing narration artifact: {{narration_path}}'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_output_path}} || { echo 'missing video artifact: {{video_output_path}}'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_bundle_dir}}/index.html || { echo 'missing video bundle index: {{video_bundle_dir}}/index.html'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_bundle_dir}}/render-plan.json || { echo 'missing video bundle render plan: {{video_bundle_dir}}/render-plan.json'; exit 1; } && test -n "$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams a:0 -show_entries stream=index -of csv=p=0 {{video_output_path}})" || { echo 'missing audio stream in rendered video'; exit 1; } && echo 'outputs verified with audio-muxed mp4'

mkdir -p {{mission_evidence_dir}}/{{video_slug}}-frames && ffmpeg -y -i {{video_output_path}} -vf "select='eq(n,0)'" -vframes 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/{{video_slug}}-frames/frame-000.png && ffmpeg -y -ss 00:00:06 -i {{video_output_path}} -vframes 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/{{video_slug}}-frames/frame-001.png && ffmpeg -y -ss 00:00:11 -i {{video_output_path}} -vframes 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/{{video_slug}}-frames/frame-002.png && echo 'key frames extracted'

if ffmpeg -hide_banner -i {{video_output_path}} -vf blackdetect=d=0.5:pic_th=0.98:pix_th=0.10 -an -f null - 2>&1 | grep -q 'black_start'; then echo 'black frame detected'; exit 1; fi && echo 'black-frame check passed'

video_duration=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=nw=1:nk=1 {{video_output_path}}) && audio_duration=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=nw=1:nk=1 {{narration_path}}) && awk -v v="$video_duration" -v a="$audio_duration" 'BEGIN { diff = v - a; if (diff < 0) diff = -diff; if (diff > 1.0) { printf("duration mismatch: video=%s audio=%s\n", v, a); exit 1; } printf("duration aligned: video=%s audio=%s\n", v, a); }'
